description: Extra advisory rows merged by z_mu_truth_check.mjs — not authoritative claims.

claims.claim_summary: Equal Opportunities frameworks list protected characteristics; summaries must mirror current forms and acts.
claims.public_wording: Complaint pathways exist for discrimination grounded in law—not for political score-settling. Operators must cite the live government form wording when publishing.
claims.next_verification_step: Verify wording against official EOC form and statutes; store snapshot date.

claims.claim_summary: Publication proposed that named official committed specific corruption without attached court disposition.
claims.public_wording: Suspended public draft: serious allegations about named persons require adjudicated findings or uncontested documentary evidence archived with AMK/ethics clearance.
claims.next_verification_step: Withdraw public draft until ethics + legal reviewers attach verified court or audit documents or restate purely as unanswered questions framed neutrally.

claims.claim_summary: Official labour statistics publications can ground index discussions when cited with retrieval date.
claims.public_wording: For macro labour discussion, prioritize Statistics Mauritius official releases—quote tables with quarter/year and hyperlink to the authoritative page—not secondary blogs.
claims.next_verification_step: Attach deep link plus retrieval UTC date in appendix when publishing summaries.

fixture_claims_red_only.claim_summary: Fixture row simulating reckless rally cry language — must NEVER ship.
fixture_claims_red_only.public_wording: We should crash the economy to force capitulation—that is sabotage rhetoric, not lawful civic discourse.
fixture_claims_red_only.next_verification_step: Discard; rewrite entirely into lawful civic petition framing if any substance remains.
